title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
summary_full: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed  since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.
summary_public: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed  since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.
